Agent formatting fixture This paragraph has bold, italic, and inline code. It also has a second line in the same paragraph. Bullet-like lines - first item - second item with code - third item with bold text Escapes and punctuation These characters should stay readable: _ * [ ] ( ) ~ ` > # + - = | { } . ! Paths and values: C:\temp\demo, a_b, x.y, and hello-world. Upload paths Uploads saved: - /workspace/inbox/photo-1453.jpg - /workspace/inbox/photo-1454.jpg Go example 
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	fmt.Println("hello")
}
